description: Baseline: CPU composeAllValueLayers, 570ms/tick mean, 1200×1200 grid, 8 zones, marketTown archetype
GPU (Dawn/WebGPU): composeAllValueLayers via compute shader — 48.8ms vs 571ms CPU, 11.7× speedup
GPU session: persistent buffers + partial uploads (only dynamic influence layers re-uploaded per tick) — 13ms mean vs 48ms per-call, 43× vs CPU baseline
Workgroup size 64 (vs 256): slight improvement in p50 11.1ms vs 11.6ms — tuned for Apple Silicon SIMD width
Shared memory weights + remove params uniform: 3% compute improvement masked by upload overhead — no net gain in full benchmark (13.3ms vs 12.78ms baseline)
Baseline: CPU computeInfluenceLayers box blur, 100ms/call mean, 1200×1200 grid, 5 layers, radii 20-60
GPU box blur (brute-force, window truncation): 40ms vs 100ms CPU baseline — 2.5× speedup. H+V passes on GPU, CPU normalization. Exact match to CPU output.
